title: Wood Carving Tools Set, 5Pcs High Manganese Steel Hand Wood Whittling Kit for Beginners, Woodworking Carving Tool with Spoon Knife, Woods Whittling, Chip Carvings Tools and Storage Bag
features: 【Sharp and Durable】: Our engraving knives are made of high quality high manganese steel material, which is sharp and has good toughness to prevent chipping and long service life.
【Practicality】Our whittling knife are professionally designed for ease of use and operation, and their precise design will ensure a high level of practicality in their work
【Comfortable Handle】The ergonomic handle of our woodworking engraving tools is designed to allow long hours of comfortable engraving without hand fatigue.

【Easy to Store】The storage pockets for the engraving tools are well made and thick, which means that the tools are well protected and stored. The durable storage case allows for increased portability.

【Versatile】The carving knife is an ideal carving tool. The carving knife is ideal for carving cork, fruit, vegetables, soap bars, candles and clay. Perfect for carving enthusiasts, whether they are beginners or professionals.
description: Product Description Features: 1. Made of high manganese steel material, long service life. 2. Precise design will ensure its practicability in the work of highly performance. 3. The ergonomic design of the handle allows having a long period of comfortable carving without hand fatigue. 4. Helpful carving tool for woodworking. 5. Suitable for both woodcarving beginners and professionals. Material: High Manganese Steel + Ash Handle Weight: Approx. 224g / 7.9oz Package List: 5 x Woodworking Carving Tools 1 x Canvas Bag
